description: A group whose members are of different playlist types. A member should be selectable only when its own type/schedule says it may play now: the Advanced (custom) member is never selected; Once-Per-X-Minutes and Once-Per-Hour members play when eligible and are skipped once they have played within their window; the Standard member is always eligible. Over four builds at 12:00: OPM (eligible), OPH (eligible, :00 window), STD, then STD again (OPM/OPH now gated, Advanced always skipped).
